Who's behind the strategy

I weave creative storytelling into strategic brand narratives that actually connect.

I'm Riya — a social media and brand manager who's spent six years learning what makes a message land. From luxury interiors and cultural brands in Dubai to real estate, salons, SaaS and education startups across India and beyond, I've built voices that audiences want to follow, not scroll past.

My work spans full-funnel strategy, content that converts, paid media, and community — always grounded in the data that tells me what's working and what to fix next.

Social Strategy Content & Copy Paid Media Brand Positioning Influencer Outreach Video / Reels Analytics Multilingual

How the work happens

A process built to compound, not just post.

01

Consultation

A thorough discussion to align on objectives, target audience, and brand identity.

02

Strategy

A custom social strategy shaped around your goals and the people you want to reach.

03

Creation

Engaging content that carries your brand identity and resonates with your audience.

04

Management

Scheduling, community engagement, and tracking the metrics that matter.

05

Analysis

Regular performance reviews to refine strategy and optimize for what works.

In their words

What clients & leads say after working together.
